title: Eton Mess Trifle
description: A classic English dessert made with crushed meringue, strawberries, and whipped cream.
instructions: In a large bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
Add the granulated sugar and vanilla extract to the whipped cream and mix until combined.
In a separate bowl, crush the Eton mess meringue into fine crumbs.
Fold the crushed meringue into the whipped cream mixture until well combined.
In a separate bowl, hull and slice the strawberries.
Fold the sliced strawberries into the meringue mixture until well combined.
Spoon the mixture into individual serving glasses or a large serving dish.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
